full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the core ISA algorithm to describe its step-by-step architecture.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain the step-by-step method of the ISA paper by Le et al. (CVPR 2011) for action recognition — from input to final output.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a structured breakdown of the ISA pipeline: patch extraction, PCA whitening, ISA learning, convolution, stacking, and SVM classification.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-referenced each step with the original paper sections and equations to ensure accuracy.
